video.title: Bitcoin — Qué es y cómo funciona

style.character: Simple geometric human silhouette, no face detail
style.note: Actualizar con estilo definitivo en GUIDE.md antes de generar imágenes

music.prompt: Cinematic lo-fi electronic instrumental, tense and intriguing, slow BPM 75, dark piano chords with subtle bass, no vocals, documentary finance mood, builds tension during key moments, resolves softly at the end, 12 minutes duration

scenes.narration: Imagínate que un día te despiertas, vas al banco, y te dicen que tu cuenta está congelada.
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, white background, simple geometric human figure standing in front of a bank counter, large red padlock symbol on a bank screen, dark navy and red palette, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: No hiciste nada malo. Simplemente decidieron que sí.
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, white background, human figure with hands raised in confusion, large red X symbol above figure, dark navy and red palette, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: O que tu transferencia al extranjero va a tardar cuatro días hábiles y te van a cobrar el 3% de comisión.
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, white background, globe with dotted arrow between two countries blocked by a clock showing 4 days and a 3% fee badge, dark navy and orange palette, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: O que el dinero que tenías guardado ahora vale menos porque alguien en un gobierno que nunca elegiste decidió imprimir más billetes.
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, white background, stack of bills on left shrinking smaller, government building with printing press on right producing more bills, downward arrow, dark navy and red palette, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: Eso no es ciencia ficción. Le pasó a millones de personas.
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, white background, large crowd of small geometric human figures, some with empty wallets and sad expressions, dark navy and red palette, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: Y fue exactamente ese problema el que hizo que alguien decidiera crear Bitcoin.
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, white background, question mark transforming into a Bitcoin orange circle with B symbol, dark navy and orange palette, transition effect, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: El 22 de mayo de 2010, un programador llamado Laszlo Hanyecz publicó un mensaje en un foro de internet.
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, dark navy background, simple figure at a computer desk, retro forum chat bubble appearing on screen, calendar showing 2010, orange accent, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: Decía algo así: 'Pagaré 10,000 bitcoins por dos pizzas.'
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, white background, chat bubble with 10,000 Bitcoin coins symbol on left, two pizza box icons on right, orange and dark navy palette, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: Alguien aceptó. Le mandaron las pizzas. Y Laszlo pagó.
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, white background, handshake between two figures, pizza boxes on one side, Bitcoin stack on other side, green checkmark, dark navy and orange palette, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: Esas dos pizzas hoy valen más de 600 millones de dólares.
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, white background, two pizza boxes with a massive price counter showing $600,000,000 with upward arrow, shocked geometric figure, orange and dark navy palette, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: Pero esta historia no empieza ahí.
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, dark navy background, horizontal timeline with glowing dot at 2010 and arrow pointing backwards to the left toward darkness, orange accent, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: Antes de terminar este video, vas a entender tres cosas: qué es Bitcoin exactamente y por qué existe, cómo funciona sin ningún banco en el medio, y por qué hay gente que se hizo millonaria con esto... y otra que lo perdió todo.
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, white background, three numbered circles in a row: 1) Bitcoin logo, 2) network without bank, 3) scale with money up on one side and down on other, dark navy and orange palette, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: Estamos en octubre de 2008. El mundo acaba de ver cómo bancos que existían hace más de cien años colapsan en semanas.
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, dark navy background, large bank building with cracks forming, 2008 date on calendar, red downward arrows, dramatic lighting, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: Lehman Brothers, uno de los bancos más grandes del planeta, acaba de declararse en quiebra.
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, dark navy background, tall skyscraper building crumbling and falling apart, red bankruptcy stamp symbol above it, dark red and navy palette, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: Los gobiernos imprimen dinero a toda velocidad para rescatarlos. Y millones de personas normales pierden sus casas, sus ahorros, su trabajo.
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, split white background, left side: government building with printing press and bills flying out, right side: small human figures losing house, wallet, briefcase, dark navy and red palette, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: En medio de ese caos, alguien con el seudónimo Satoshi Nakamoto publicó un documento de 9 páginas.
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, dark navy background, anonymous shadowed figure at a computer, glowing document with 9 pages floating up, question mark halo above figure, orange accent, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: Lo tituló: 'Bitcoin: A Peer-to-Peer Electronic Cash System.' Un sistema de efectivo electrónico de persona a persona.
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, white background, clean document with Bitcoin logo at top, two geometric figures connected by direct arrow with coin symbol, orange and dark navy palette, no text in scene, clean professional style

scenes.narration: Nadie lo leyó. Excepto un grupo pequeño de programadores en un foro oscuro de internet.
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, dark navy background, large crowd of grey figures ignoring a glowing document, small cluster of 5 bright orange figures in corner focused on a screen, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: En ese documento, Satoshi escribió algo que vale la pena citar textual: 'Los bancos necesitan ser de confianza para manejar nuestro dinero. Pero la historia del dinero bancario está llena de traiciones a esa confianza.'
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, dark navy background, large quotation mark icon, bank building with broken trust/handshake symbol below it, orange accent lines, dramatic composition, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: Esa frase lo explica todo. Bitcoin no fue inventado para hacerte rico. Fue inventado para que nadie más controle tu dinero.
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, white background, Bitcoin orange circle with shield icon, hand reaching toward it blocked by a no-entry symbol, human figure holding coin freely with green checkmark, dark navy palette, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: Para entender Bitcoin, primero hay que entender cómo funciona el dinero normal.
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, white background, single bill floating in center with magnifying glass over it, question mark next to it, dark navy and green palette, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: El billete que tienes en el bolsillo no vale nada en sí mismo. Es papel.
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, white background, single bill being zoomed in to show just paper texture with wood pulp pattern, equals sign to a simple square of paper, dark navy and grey palette, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: Vale porque todos acordamos que vale. Y porque un gobierno lo respalda.
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, white background, large crowd of geometric figures with checkmark speech bubbles above them pointing to a bill, government building with support arrow below the bill, dark navy palette, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: Eso se llama moneda fiduciaria — su valor depende de la confianza en la institución que la emite.
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, white background, bill connected by chain to government building column, fragile chain link highlighted in center representing trust, dark navy and yellow palette, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: El problema es que esa institución puede tomar decisiones que afecten tu dinero sin pedirte permiso.
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, white background, large government institution building making a decision (gavel icon), small human figure below with no speech bubble or input, red dotted line connecting them, dark navy and red palette, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: Puede imprimir más billetes, lo que hace que los tuyos valgan menos. Eso se llama inflación.
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, white background, pile of new bills being printed on right, existing bills on left shrinking in size with downward arrow, inflation label indicator, dark navy and red palette, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: Puede congelar cuentas. Puede cobrar comisiones. Puede bloquear transferencias.
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, white background, three panels: 1) frozen account with ice/padlock, 2) percentage fee badge on money transfer, 3) blocked transfer arrow with stop sign, dark navy and red palette, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: Para mover dinero de un país a otro hoy, necesitas pasar por al menos dos bancos, un sistema de mensajería financiera llamado SWIFT, y esperar días. Y pagar.
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, white background, two countries connected by complex path through multiple bank buildings and a central SWIFT hub, clock showing days and fee badge, dark navy and orange palette, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: Satoshi se preguntó: ¿y si pudiéramos enviar valor directamente, de persona a persona, como enviamos un email?
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, white background, two human figures connected by direct orange arrow with coin and envelope icon, large question mark above, no intermediary buildings, dark navy and orange palette, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: Sin intermediario. Sin permiso. Sin comisión.
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, white background, three crossed-out icons in a row: bank building with X, permission stamp with X, percentage fee with X, orange accent color, dark navy palette, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: La respuesta fue Bitcoin.
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, dark navy background, large glowing Bitcoin orange circle with B symbol center screen, clean minimal composition, spotlight effect, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: Pero había un problema enorme con ese modelo. Y es el que durante décadas hizo que nadie creyera que fuera posible.
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, white background, large question mark blocking a path forward, timeline of decades with X marks, dark navy and red palette, tension composition, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: Si yo te mando un archivo por email, no te mando el original — te mando una copia. Y me quedo con el original.
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, white background, person sending document via arrow, duplicate copy appears on receiver side while original stays on sender side, two identical documents highlighted, dark navy palette, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: Con el dinero digital pasa lo mismo. Si el dinero es solo un número en una computadora, ¿qué me impide copiarlo y gastarlo dos veces?
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, white background, single digital coin duplicating into two identical coins, both being spent in different directions simultaneously, red warning icon, dark navy and red palette, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: Ese problema se llama el doble gasto. Y durante décadas, la única solución que existía era tener a alguien en el medio que llevara el registro. Un banco.
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, white background, two figures exchanging digital money, large bank building in center as intermediary with ledger book, decades timeline above, dark navy palette, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: Satoshi resolvió ese problema sin necesitar ese intermediario. ¿Cómo? Con la blockchain.
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, dark navy background, bank building crossed out and fading, chain of linked blocks forming in orange light between two figures, question mark resolving to checkmark, orange accent, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: Imagina un cuaderno donde se registra cada transacción de Bitcoin que ocurre en el mundo. Pero en lugar de que ese cuaderno lo tenga un banco en una caja fuerte, existe una copia idéntica en millones de computadoras al mismo tiempo.
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, dark navy background, open ledger notebook in center, millions of glowing computer nodes around the globe each holding identical copies, connected network lines, orange accent, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: Cada vez que alguien envía Bitcoin, esa transacción se anuncia a toda la red. Todas las computadoras la verifican.
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, dark navy background, single transaction announcement radiating outward like a signal wave to many computer nodes, each node lighting up with checkmark symbol, orange and teal palette, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: Y cuando suficientes de ellas la confirman, la transacción se graba en el cuaderno. Y ya no se puede borrar.
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, white background, transaction being stamped into ledger book with permanent ink, padlock icon sealing it, eraser being blocked by shield, dark navy and orange palette, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: Para alterar esa transacción, tendrías que cambiar el cuaderno en más de la mitad de todos esos millones de computadoras al mismo tiempo. En términos prácticos, es imposible.
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, dark navy background, 50%+ of millions of nodes highlighted as required target, single small figure attempting to reach all of them, red impossible stamp, overwhelming scale visualization, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: A ese cuaderno distribuido se le llama blockchain — cadena de bloques. Cada bloque es un grupo de transacciones.
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, white background, horizontal chain of rectangular blocks each containing small transaction icons inside, blocks linked by heavy chain connections, orange and dark navy palette, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: Cada bloque está matemáticamente conectado al anterior. Si alguien altera uno, rompe todos los demás.
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, white background, chain of blocks with one block highlighted in red being altered, all subsequent blocks breaking apart with cracks, chain reaction visualization, dark navy and red palette, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: Y nadie controla ese cuaderno. Ni Satoshi, ni ningún gobierno, ni ningún banco. Lo controlan todos y no lo controla nadie.
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, dark navy background, distributed globe network with no central point, all nodes equal size and brightness, no hierarchy, orange connection lines, anonymous figures at each node, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: ¿Quién verifica las transacciones si no hay banco? Eso lo hacen los mineros.
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, white background, bank building with X, replaced by figure with mining helmet and pickaxe at computer rig, orange accent, dark navy palette, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: Un minero es una computadora —a veces miles de computadoras— que compite para resolver un problema matemático muy difícil.
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, white background, many computer servers racing toward a complex mathematical puzzle icon in center, competition arrows, dark navy and orange palette, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: El primero en resolverlo gana el derecho a agregar el siguiente bloque de transacciones al cuaderno. Y como recompensa, recibe Bitcoin recién creado.
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, white background, single winning computer with gold trophy, adding new block to blockchain, fresh Bitcoin coin appearing as reward, orange and gold palette, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: Eso es minar Bitcoin.
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, dark navy background, simple clean icon of Bitcoin coin emerging from a mine shaft with pickaxe, orange glow, minimal composition, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: ¿Cuántos Bitcoin puede haber en total? Satoshi lo fijó en 21 millones. Para siempre. No hay más.
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, white background, large number 21,000,000 with hard cap ceiling icon above it, government printing press on side with blocked arrow showing it cannot add more, dark navy and orange palette, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: Esa limitación es intencional — es lo opuesto a un gobierno que imprime dinero cuando quiere. Nunca va a haber un Bitcoin número 21,000,001.
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, white background, split comparison: left side government printing unlimited bills, right side Bitcoin fixed supply bar maxed at 21M with no overflow possible, dark navy and orange palette, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: Pero si todo esto suena tan bien, ¿por qué hay personas que perdieron absolutamente todo?
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, dark navy background, Bitcoin logo with question mark shadow beneath it, small figure at edge of cliff looking down, dramatic red warning light, tension composition, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: Bitcoin es, en palabras simples, el activo más volátil de la historia moderna.
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, white background, extreme zigzag price chart with massive peaks and valleys, volatility visualization, dark navy and orange palette, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: En 2017, subió de 1,000 dólares a casi 20,000 en doce meses. Luego bajó 80% en el siguiente año.
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, white background, price chart showing sharp spike from low to high in 2017 then steep 80% drop, year labels on x-axis as visual only, orange and red palette, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: En 2020, cayó 50% en un solo día durante el pánico del COVID.
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, white background, price line cliff dropping 50% in single bar, COVID mask icon in background, panic red color, dark navy palette, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: En 2021, llegó a 68,000 dólares. En 2022, volvió a 16,000.
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, white background, two data point visualization: peak orange bar at 68k then valley red bar at 16k, mountain and valley silhouette style, dark navy palette, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: Ni Warren Buffett ha visto movimientos así en toda su carrera.
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, white background, simple investor figure with iconic round glasses and suit, calm steady line chart next to wild Bitcoin chart, scale comparison, dark navy and orange palette, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: Hay gente que compró en los picos, entró en pánico, vendió en los valles, y perdió los ahorros de años.
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, white background, human figure buying at chart peak with green arrow, then panic face, selling at valley with red arrow and empty wallet, dark navy and red palette, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: Hay personas que vendieron sus casas para comprar Bitcoin y quedaron en la calle.
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, white background, house with for sale sign on left, Bitcoin coins in middle, figure sitting on street with empty pockets on right, red background tint, dark navy palette, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: Y hay otras que compraron y olvidaron, aguantaron cada caída, y hoy tienen retornos que ninguna inversión convencional podría ofrecer.
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, white background, person sleeping peacefully while chart goes up dramatically over many years in background, green upward trend, calendar pages flipping, dark navy and green palette, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: La diferencia no fue suerte. Fue tiempo y tolerancia al riesgo.
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, white background, dice crossed out on left (no luck), clock and shield icon on right (time and risk tolerance), clean split comparison, dark navy and orange palette, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: Tu cartera digital, llamada wallet, funciona con dos claves: una pública, que es como la dirección de tu casa — la puedes compartir con cualquiera para que te manden dinero.
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, white background, digital wallet with two keys, one key labeled with house address icon (public, shared openly), one key hidden with padlock, dark navy and orange palette, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: Y una privada, que es la llave de tu puerta — si la pierdes, pierdes el acceso a todo lo que tienes adentro. Para siempre.
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, dark navy background, door with keyhole, key falling and vanishing, vault full of Bitcoin behind locked door, permanent lock symbol, red accent for danger, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: Hay discos duros tirados en basureros con miles de Bitcoin adentro. Porque alguien tiró la llave sin darse cuenta.
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, dark navy background, trash bin with hard drive inside glowing orange with Bitcoin symbol, person walking away unaware, lost fortune visualization, muted and dark palette, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: Bitcoin tiene casos de uso reales: en países con hiperinflación como Venezuela o Argentina, hay gente que lo usa para proteger sus ahorros.
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, white background, map of South America with Venezuela and Argentina highlighted, Bitcoin shield protecting savings jar from inflation fire, dark navy and orange palette, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: En países con restricciones bancarias, para enviar dinero al extranjero sin pagar el 10% de comisión.
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, white background, direct orange arrow between two country flags bypassing bank building, small fee badge showing near-zero vs big red 10% badge, dark navy palette, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: También tiene problemas reales: consume muchísima energía. Se ha usado en crímenes.
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, white background, two warning icons: left shows power plant with massive energy consumption flames, right shows crime/warning triangle symbol, balanced neutral tone, dark navy and yellow palette, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: Su volatilidad lo hace difícil de usar como moneda del día a día.
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, white background, person trying to buy coffee with Bitcoin coin, price tag changing multiple times rapidly with question marks, confused cashier, dark navy and orange palette, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: No es una solución mágica. Pero tampoco es una estafa. Es una tecnología con más de 15 años de historia ininterrumpida funcionando exactamente como Satoshi dijo que funcionaría.
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, white background, Bitcoin logo centered with balanced scale: no magic wand on left, no scam symbol on right, 15-year unbroken timeline below, solid foundation blocks, dark navy and orange palette, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: ¿Recuerdas lo que dijo Satoshi en 2008? 'Los bancos necesitan ser de confianza para manejar nuestro dinero.'
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, dark navy background, large quotation mark glowing in orange, callback visual echo of scene 19, bank building with broken trust symbol returning, same composition as Act IV callback, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: La próxima vez que pagues una comisión por transferir tu propio dinero, o que esperes tres días para que llegue un pago, o que veas en las noticias que algún gobierno congeló cuentas — vas a escuchar esa frase con otros oídos.
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, white background, everyday person paying bank fee, waiting with clock, seeing news of frozen accounts, all three scenes connected to a glowing ear hearing the quote, dark navy and orange palette, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: No porque Bitcoin sea la respuesta a todo. Sino porque por primera vez en la historia, existe una alternativa. Y ya sabes exactamente cómo funciona.
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, dark navy background, fork in road with traditional bank path on left and Bitcoin path on right both visible and open, figure standing at fork with knowledge represented as light bulb, orange accent, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: Esto no es consejo financiero. Investiga por tu cuenta. Y nunca pongas en riesgo más de lo que puedes permitirte perder.
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, white background, warning shield icon with information symbol, person with research book and magnifying glass, simple risk gauge not in red zone, dark navy and yellow palette, no text, clean professional style

scenes.narration: Si este te pareció útil, ya sabes lo que sigue.
scenes.image_prompt: Flat 2D minimalist illustration, dark navy background, simple thumbs up and subscribe bell icon in orange, minimal clean composition, no text, clean professional style
